serverUrl.name: Server URL
serverUrl.hint: The WebSocket URL of your Fate's Edge server (e.g., ws://localhost:3000 or wss://your-server.com)

roomCode.name: Room Code
roomCode.hint: The room code to join (e.g., ABC123)

playerName.name: Player Name
playerName.hint: Your display name in the VTT (defaults to your Foundry username)

autoConnect.name: Auto-Connect
autoConnect.hint: Automatically connect to the server when Foundry loads

syncChat.name: Sync Foundry Chat
syncChat.hint: Send Foundry chat messages to the VTT

syncRolls.name: Sync Foundry Rolls
syncRolls.hint: Send Foundry dice rolls to the VTT

syncActors.name: Sync Actors to VTT
syncActors.hint: Sync selected Foundry actors to the VTT as characters (experimental)

gmFeaturesEnabled.name: Enable GM Management Features
gmFeaturesEnabled.hint: Enable Game Master election, promotion, and management UI

notifications.requestSent: GM request sent. Waiting for approval.
notifications.resignInfo: To resign, approve a pending request or use /vtt gm approve to promote someone else.
